message:
feat: score/source/location hierarchy with dedicated style tokens (2dccg.9.3)

Adds STYLE_SOURCE_LOCAL (muted), STYLE_SOURCE_REMOTE (info+italic), and
STYLE_LOCATION (subtle) tokens for clear provenance scanning. Remote sources
now visually distinct from local. 4 new hierarchy invariant tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -537,8 +537,8 @@
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.6","title":"Add search-surface regression tests (structure, interactions, and visual hierarchy)","description":"## Goal
Protect search-surface rendering with tests that verify structure, interactions, and visual hierarchy remain correct after polish changes.

## Scope Boundary (Canonical)
This bead is the **single owner** of search-surface regression coverage.
- Includes: search bar, filter pills, breadcrumbs, footer HUD, and search-input affordance behavior.
- Excludes: results-surface regression ownership (`2dccg.9.5`), global interaction state-machine routing ownership (`2dccg.11.2`), cross-theme/degradation matrix aggregation (`2dccg.6.3`), and full workflow E2E playback (`2dccg.11.3`).
- Must reuse baseline fixtures/helpers from `2dccg.6.2` instead of duplicating baseline snapshot setup.

## Test Scenarios

### Structure Tests
- Search bar renders with mode-aware title and cursor position.
- Filter pills render with correct style tokens (STYLE_PILL_ACTIVE for active, standard for inactive).
- Breadcrumb trail renders with clickable segments and correct emphasis.
- Footer HUD renders with KBD key/desc token styling.
- Layout respects LayoutBreakpoint constraints (search bar width, pill wrapping).

### Interaction Tests
- Tab key cycles through filter pills in expected order.
- Enter key on search bar triggers search.
- Click on pill toggles active/inactive state.
- Escape key clears search input or exits mode.
- Mouse hover on interactive elements shows correct cursor affordance.

### Visual Hierarchy Tests
- Active filter pills have higher visual weight than inactive.
- Search bar input area is visually distinct from surrounding chrome.
- Footer key hints maintain KBD/desc pairing across themes.
- Theme switch updates all search-surface styles immediately.

## Logging
- Each test case logs: test_id, component, action, expected_state, actual_state.
- Failures include terminal size, active theme, degradation level.
- Use structured logging from `2dccg.11.6` when available.

## Acceptance Criteria
- All search-surface regressions from the ftui migration are caught.
- Tests run in < 3s total and require no terminal (headless).
- Test names clearly indicate which search-surface element is being validated.
- Suite composes with `2dccg.6.2`/`2dccg.6.3`/`2dccg.11.x` without duplicate ownership.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:15.642528388Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T22:05:32.127079571Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:46:16.298074887Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:15.642528388Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:51:36.523677893Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:51:40.892002824Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:51:46.311618406Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:52:05.096187123Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":373,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.6","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution contract for this task:
1) Treat this bead title+description as the authoritative scope; do not rely on external planning docs.
2) Record touched files/functions and behavior surfaces in completion notes.
3) Provide deterministic before/after evidence (tests, snapshots, logs, or captures as applicable).
4) Validate across relevant themes/profiles/breakpoints/degradation levels for this surface.
5) Explicitly document tradeoffs, residual risks, and follow-up opportunities.
6) Do not close until acceptance criteria are demonstrably satisfied with linked evidence artifacts.","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:34Z"},{"id":423,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.6","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Planning-space optimization pass (2026-02-08): tightened canonical scope boundaries to remove test ownership overlap while preserving full feature/test intent. Explicit include/exclude contracts now separate component-level, surface-level, policy-matrix, and cross-cutting verification responsibilities so parallel execution is safer and less duplicative.","created_at":"2026-02-08T22:04:11Z"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9","title":"Track I: Results-surface richness + motion parity restoration","description":"## Objective
Rebuild results-pane visual density, hierarchy, and kinetic feedback so high-volume result scanning feels premium rather than flat.

## Why This Track Exists
The results surface is the highest-frequency user touchpoint. Legacy FTUI rehab work identified regressions in grouped pane structure, snippet richness, score/source cues, density tuning, and animation reconnect.

## Scope
- Pane chrome/focus clarity
- Snippet rendering quality and wrap budgets
- Score bars/source cues/remote tint/striping hierarchy
- Reveal/focus animation state wiring with budget guardrails
- Compact/cozy/spacious density tuning

## Deliverables
- Faster cognitive scan of result lists
- Strong visual prioritization of relevance/context
- Performance-safe motion and density behavior

## Completion Criteria
- Results-pane rubric dimensions hit target threshold
- No frame-budget regressions caused by richer rendering
- Regression tests lock visual structure across densities","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:45:42.073119807Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:38.831253253Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:45:42.073119807Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:49:37.792307379Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":384,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Track orchestration note:
- This bead is a coordination container. Prefer executing ready leaf tasks under this track.
- Keep scope boundaries explicit to avoid duplicate implementation across sibling tracks.
- Ensure subtask closure writes enough evidence/context so future contributors can continue without external documents.","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:38Z"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.1","title":"Restore grouped results-pane chrome and focus clarity","description":"## Goal
Re-establish clear pane grouping and focus semantics so users can rapidly orient between results/detail/status regions.

## Work Items
- Improve pane chrome consistency and focused-region emphasis
- Ensure focus transitions remain obvious without overpowering content
- Validate rendering coherence across breakpoints

## Acceptance
- Pane boundaries/focus are immediately legible
- No regressions in keyboard navigation between panes
- Degraded modes keep essential grouping cues","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:28.817403723Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T23:02:43.456029720Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T23:01:41.388866031Z","close_reason":"Completed: results-pane chrome/focus clarity verified, degradation grouping regression added, and strict quality gates passed.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.10.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:57:17.846255212Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:28.817403723Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":374,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution contract for this task:
1) Treat this bead title+description as the authoritative scope; do not rely on external planning docs.
2) Record touched files/functions and behavior surfaces in completion notes.
3) Provide deterministic before/after evidence (tests, snapshots, logs, or captures as applicable).
4) Validate across relevant themes/profiles/breakpoints/degradation levels for this surface.
5) Explicitly document tradeoffs, residual risks, and follow-up opportunities.
6) Do not close until acceptance criteria are demonstrably satisfied with linked evidence artifacts.","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:34Z"},{"id":435,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"AzureElk claim (2026-02-08): implementing grouped results-pane chrome and focus clarity.","created_at":"2026-02-08T22:37:17Z"},{"id":440,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed results-pane chrome/focus clarity lane and closed the acceptance gaps with degradation-level grouping coverage.

Delivered scope:
- Verified focused/unfocused pane chrome semantics are active in results/detail rendering paths (title/border emphasis + split-handle grouping cue).
- Added regression test to lock essential grouping cues across degradation levels in dual-pane layouts.

Files/functions touched:
- src/ui/app.rs
  - Added test: dual_pane_grouping_cues_survive_degradation_levels
- src/ui/style_system.rs
  - Minor clippy/API compatibility cleanups in style tests to keep strict gates green (`query == query.bold()` semantics + `is_some_and` modernizations).

Deterministic evidence:
- cargo test dual_pane_ -- --nocapture
- cargo test status_footer -- --nocapture
- cargo test tui_pty_search_detail_and_quit_flow --test e2e_tui_smoke_flows -- --nocapture
- cargo check --all-targets
- cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
- cargo fmt --check

Acceptance mapping:
- Pane boundaries/focus legibility: covered by existing focused chrome paths + hit-region/focus regression suite and dual-pane tests.
- Keyboard navigation regressions: existing focus-toggle tests remain green.
- Degraded modes preserving essential grouping cues: explicitly covered by new degradation-level dual-pane grouping test.","created_at":"2026-02-08T23:01:28Z"},{"id":441,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"AzureElk evidence: Added 3 semantic style tokens (STYLE_PANE_TITLE_FOCUSED, STYLE_PANE_TITLE_UNFOCUSED, STYLE_SPLIT_HANDLE). Focused pane title uses accent+bold, unfocused uses muted. Split handle renders as │ divider with border color. Wired border_style() into Block for results and detail panes. 5 style_system tests (title focus/bold/distinct, handle fg/bg) + 3 app tests (dual-pane divider render, single-pane no handle, pane titles in output). 90 style_system tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.","created_at":"2026-02-08T23:02:43Z"}]}

- No broken wrapping artifacts on narrow terminals
- Snapshot diffs clearly validate snippet structure","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:28.935216143Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:35.000968679Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:28.935216143Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:52:34.405303011Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":375,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution contract for this task:

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.4","title":"Reconnect reveal/focus-flash animation state with performance guardrails","description":"## Goal
Restore meaningful motion cues without compromising frame budget stability.

## Work Items
- Wire existing animation state into live result rendering paths
- Add capability/degradation-aware animation suppression rules
- Validate behavior under heavy result counts

## Acceptance
- Motion improves orientation (not decorative noise)
- No frame-time regressions in stress scenarios
- Animation disabling paths remain deterministic","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:42.206602678Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T21:30:58.062821666Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.10.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:52:42.962429746Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:57:48.053752836Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:42.206602678Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":377,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution contract for this task:

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","title":"Add results-surface regression suite (density, snippets, score cues, focus behavior)","description":"## Goal
Protect results-surface rendering with tests that verify density, snippets, score cues, and focus behavior remain correct after polish changes.

## Scope Boundary (Canonical)
This bead is the **single owner** of results-surface regression coverage.
- Includes: grouped pane chrome, density behavior, snippet quality, score/source hierarchy, focus/navigation cues on results surfaces.
- Excludes: search-surface regression ownership (`2dccg.8.6`), global interaction state-machine routing ownership (`2dccg.11.2`), cross-theme/degradation matrix aggregation (`2dccg.6.3`), and end-to-end workflow playback ownership (`2dccg.11.3`).
- Must consume fixture foundations from `2dccg.6.1`/`2dccg.6.2` rather than duplicating equivalent fixture builders.

## Test Scenarios

### Density Tests
- Compact mode: minimum vertical space per result (measure line count).
- Cozy mode: readable spacing between metadata elements.
- Spacious mode: generous padding for presentation contexts.
- Mode switching preserves scroll position and selected item.

### Snippet Tests
- Snippet wrapping respects available width (no horizontal overflow).
- Fallback chain: rendered snippet -> raw text -> 'No preview available'.
- Long snippets truncate with ellipsis at configured budget.
- Highlight matches within snippets use correct search-match style.

### Score/Hierarchy Tests
- Score indicator uses STYLE_SCORE_HIGH/MED/LOW based on thresholds.
- Source badge renders with agent-specific accent color.
- Remote/local indicator is visually distinct.
- Metadata stripe (date, host, tokens) is scannable at speed.
- Selected result has clear focus indicator distinct from hover.

### Focus/Navigation Tests
- Arrow keys move selection with visible focus change.
- Page up/down moves by viewport-worth of results.
- Home/End jumps to first/last result.
- Focus persists through theme switch and filter changes.

## Logging
- Each test logs: test_id, result_index, density_mode, expected_layout, actual_layout.
- Failures include viewport size, result count, scroll offset.
- Emit structured logs compatible with `2dccg.11.6`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Results-pane regressions from ftui migration are caught.
- Tests cover all 3 density modes x at least 2 themes.
- Test suite runs in < 3s headless.
- Suite composes with `2dccg.6.2`/`2dccg.6.3`/`2dccg.11.x` without duplicative  {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.6","title":"Retune compact/cozy/spacious density modes to match documented intent","description":"## Goal
Make density modes distinctly useful and predictable for different terminal sizes/workflows.

## Work Items
- Rebalance row heights, snippet budgets, and spacing per density preset
- Validate transitions between modes in live session
- Ensure each preset has clear rationale and docs alignment

## Acceptance
- Users can intentionally choose density based on task context
- Density mode differences are obvious and stable
- Snapshot coverage validates all three modes","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:42.801479264Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:36.726579208Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:42.801479264Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:53:11.693157427Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:53:03.512756314Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":379,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.6","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution contract for this task:
